responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely regret that your recent visit did not meet your expectations. However, we would like to clarify that your booking was made through the Swiggy deal for 2 guests, and as per the deal terms (also communicated via WhatsApp), only the booked number of guests can be accommodated under the offer.
On your arrival, our restaurant was already fully occupied, and since you arrived with a group of 6 guests, we were unable to provide additional seating at that time. We truly understand your disappointment, but our team was following the booking and seating policy to ensure fairness to all our guests who had prior reservations.
We value your patronage and hope to welcome you again soon with a better experience.
Warm regards

name: Omisha Kaul
text:
Lotus Leaf Restaurant at PVR Prashant Vihar has won our hearts with its exquisite ambiance and mouthwatering food—making it an ideal spot for family dinners, casual outings, or even small celebrations.
Decor & Ambiance
The restaurant’s lotus-themed decor is absolutely beautiful—soft lighting, elegant wall art, big projector, light background music and subtle floral accents create a serene yet vibrant atmosphere.
- The spacious seating is thoughtfully arranged, offering both privacy and a cozy, welcoming vibe.
Aesthetic touches like delicate table settings and fresh flowers add a charming feel.
Food & Service
-Menu Highlights : Sangria thai iced tea, dark chocolate brownie shake, kala khatta, Farm house pizza and paneer tikka tacos.
Perfect for Every Occasion
-Post-movie meals (thanks to the PVR proximity!).
Lotus Leaf isn’t just a restaurant—it’s an experience. The pretty decor elevates the dining vibe, while the delicious food keeps us coming back.
Perfect for: Families, couples, friends, and solo diners looking for great food in a lovely setting.
Pro Tip: Visit in the evening—the soft lighting makes the ambiance even more magical!

Butter Naan soft and good
Garlic / Garlic butter naan it's really tasty... (must try)
Manchurian greavy it's yummy..

White sauce Pasta not good in taste, portion is very less and origano taste is ver6 bad don't know why... kids more like other food items...

Service and Clieniness: There is some stincy or very bad odour is coming, which is the minus point.. cutlery not cleaned properly... told
3-4 times to replace, ask number of times for tissues to clean the plates and spoon.. with Chinese food they must provide fork. Again asked 3-5times.. service is very very slow.. when we visited one ladies kitty grp left and we 7 came for lunch.. and hardly 2-3 peoples are there... for every little thing we asked 3-4 times which is not good..
PLEASE IMPROVE THE SERVICE AREA...

Atmosphere: almost tables vacants, decoration is good.. need to change the seats or atleast dry cleaned it...huge bar..
Overall it's OK..

Due to so much humid outside we didn't leave the place and give a try... found its OK OK...

name: Chirag Arora
text:
Lotus Leaf in Prashant Vihar, Delhi, truly stands out as a fantastic dining destination. With its inviting ambiance, delicious food, and attentive service, it offers an experience that keeps customers coming back for more.

The menu is a delightful blend of flavors, catering to a variety of tastes and preferences. From classic dishes to innovative culinary creations, everything is prepared with fresh, high-quality ingredients. Each dish is beautifully presented, and the taste is consistently remarkable, making it a treat for both the eyes and the palate.

The restaurant’s ambiance is another highlight. Its modern yet cozy interiors create a welcoming atmosphere, whether you’re dining with family, catching up with friends, or enjoying a special occasion. The seating is comfortable, and the overall vibe is perfect for relaxing and savoring a great meal.

The service at Lotus Leaf deserves special mention. The staff are courteous, attentive, and efficient, ensuring that every guest feels valued and well taken care of. Their dedication to making each visit enjoyable is truly commendable.

A big thank you to the team at Lotus Leaf for consistently delivering such a wonderful dining experience. Keep up the great work—your commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is truly appreciated!

I liked the place, interiors, theme of Lotus leaves, quality of food, cricket screening through unnoticeable overhead projectors.Service is also good. However, It's a bit high on price. If we can have 15/20 % discount, then i would say that it's a must visit. If you aren't sure about other options while choosing a spot for inviting someone special for  lunch/ dinner around this area, you can certainly consider this. You will have great time!
